## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new employee Tamara Luzajic and provide orientation for her first day and week at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/8cS448NuQL9e9EodoZ8MuVyc1g4MNCJ3?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Tamara to focus on setting up tools (1Password, Zoom, Slack) and reviewing onboarding resources in Notion/Linear on Day 1](https://fathom.video/share/8cS448NuQL9e9EodoZ8MuVyc1g4MNCJ3?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [GrowthX uses unlimited PTO policy with 1-2 weeks notice expected for time off](https://fathom.video/share/8cS448NuQL9e9EodoZ8MuVyc1g4MNCJ3?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
  - Tamara will use <team@growthxlabs.com> email for client meetings and tool access
  - [Linear (project management tool) having technical issues for Tamara - IT support needed](https://fathom.video/share/8cS448NuQL9e9EodoZ8MuVyc1g4MNCJ3?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)

## Topics

### Introductions and Background

  - [Alice Ochieng: EA at GrowthX supporting engineering/ops teams, based in Nairobi but works Pacific time](https://fathom.video/share/8cS448NuQL9e9EodoZ8MuVyc1g4MNCJ3?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)
  - [Tamara Luzajic: Content writer with 15+ years experience, mother of one daughter](https://fathom.video/share/8cS448NuQL9e9EodoZ8MuVyc1g4MNCJ3?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Onboarding Resources and Expectations

  - [Notion handbook contains company-wide onboarding tasks for Day 1 and Week 1](https://fathom.video/share/8cS448NuQL9e9EodoZ8MuVyc1g4MNCJ3?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [Linear project management tool mirrors Notion tasks for tracking progress](https://fathom.video/share/8cS448NuQL9e9EodoZ8MuVyc1g4MNCJ3?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
  - [4+ hours overlap with Pacific time required for remote work](https://fathom.video/share/8cS448NuQL9e9EodoZ8MuVyc1g4MNCJ3?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Daily updates via Geekbot tool for team visibility](https://fathom.video/share/8cS448NuQL9e9EodoZ8MuVyc1g4MNCJ3?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [Weekly all-hands meeting on Fridays - new hires introduce themselves](https://fathom.video/share/8cS448NuQL9e9EodoZ8MuVyc1g4MNCJ3?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)

### Tools and Access Setup

  - Assisted Tamara with accessing <team@growthxlabs.com> email
  - [Troubleshooted 1Password login issues](https://fathom.video/share/8cS448NuQL9e9EodoZ8MuVyc1g4MNCJ3?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Linear having technical glitches for Tamara - to be escalated to IT](https://fathom.video/share/8cS448NuQL9e9EodoZ8MuVyc1g4MNCJ3?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)

### Content Manager-Specific Onboarding

  - [Two-week delivery onboarding bootcamp to be completed at Tamara's pace](https://fathom.video/share/8cS448NuQL9e9EodoZ8MuVyc1g4MNCJ3?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)
  - [Manager (Matthew) will provide more details in 1:1 meeting](https://fathom.video/share/8cS448NuQL9e9EodoZ8MuVyc1g4MNCJ3?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
